meta.title: DFK PvE Abilities Master
notes: Merged from: Phase2-Part1 (Archer/Priest), Phase2-Part2 (Wizard/Pirate), Phase2-Part3 (Berserker/Seer), Knight+Warrior Final (validated screenshots).
Formulas preserved as strings for runtime evaluation.
ATTACK and SPELL are live combat stats preferred from telemetry; fallback derivations used when unavailable.
sourceConfidence: validated_screenshot for Phase2 and Knight/Warrior Final; doc_based for v1.0 entries.

abilities.name: Challenge
notes: Branch logic: taunt success vs fail yields different outcomes. Use Monte Carlo.

abilities.name: For Honor

passiveRules.description: Allies behind gain PDEF% based on this Knight's PDEF

notes: Positional aura — requires P1/P2/P3 awareness

abilities.name: Interception

combo.condition: Forever Vigilant was used last turn

notes: 50% physical damage redirect from ally behind. Position-critical.

abilities.name: Royal Guard
notes: High initiative gain (+400). Redirects negative statuses from ally behind.

abilities.name: Shield Smash

combo.condition: Hold The Line was used last turn

notes: If target was Rooted: extra root chance (20+6*END)%

abilities.name: Shield Up

notes: Self-penalty: -20% damage for 3 turns
+300 initiative gain. Strong defense at cost of damage output.

abilities.name: Ironclad Defense

combo.condition: another Iron discipline passive is active

notes: Reduces damage from P2/P3 enemies — position dependent

abilities.name: Iron Shield

combo.condition: an Iron discipline passive is active

notes: +100 initiative. Iron passive combo unlocks push/pull resistance.

abilities.name: Whirlwind

notes: 90% chance to slow self 25% for 25 ticks
High-risk AoE. Self-slow is very likely. -600 initiative loss is severe.

abilities.name: Rapid Onslaught
notes: Combo: 4 hits with +10% ACC. Base: 3 hits at -25% damage mod.
Applies to basic attacks

passiveRules.description: Basic attacks cleave adjacent enemies at -25% damage, -10% ACC

notes: Passive -10% damage output

abilities.name: Gruff
notes: 4-turn amnesia — use sparingly

abilities.name: Nuff
notes: 100% physical redirect from ally behind. Position-critical. Buff combo adds PDEF.

abilities.name: War Cry
notes: Team multiplier — high value in multi-hero fights. Pairs with Punish for Silence combo.

abilities.name: Punish

combo.condition: target is Bleeding or Dazed or Stunned or Intimidated

notes: Large combo bonus vs CC'd targets. Pair with War Cry Intimidate or any CC.

abilities.name: Final Blow

notes: Heaviest accuracy penalty in dataset
Only recommend when target HP is <10% OR team cannot survive the next several turns. -30% ACC is game-changing risk.
Passive: takes 10% more damage

abilities.name: Rapid Shot
notes: Random targets — use Monte Carlo for multi-enemy valuation

abilities.name: Precision Strike
notes: Channels at 700 initiative. High damage. Positive ACC modifier.

abilities.name: Piercing Shot
notes: 65% pierce — bypasses significant PDEF. Prioritize armored targets.

abilities.name: Prayer of Might
notes: Heal + ATK buff. Good for Warrior/Knight who benefit from both.

abilities.name: Prayer of Protection
notes: Barrier scales with SPELL and WIS — strong on high-WIS Priests

abilities.name: Cleansing Gift
notes: Heal + cleanse — high value when debuffs are active on ally

abilities.name: Fire Bolt
notes: Generates 3 Arcane Power. Track AP as explicit resource state.

abilities.name: Fireball
notes: Consumes 5 AP. Only recommend when AP >= 5.

abilities.name: Fire Storm
notes: Channels at 600 initiative. AoE — high value vs multi-enemy encounters.

abilities.name: Pyroclast Explosion
notes: AP-scaling nuke. Value scales with accumulated Arcane Power (max 30).

abilities.name: Frost Lance
notes: Channels at 500 initiative.

abilities.name: Wall of Reflection
notes: Wall HP scales with AP. Reflect pulses at 20 and 30 ticks.

abilities.name: Blunderbusster
notes: Anti-barrier/anti-wall. High value vs Priest/Wizard protective setups.

abilities.name: Starboard Cannons
notes: Longest channel in dataset: 800 initiative. PDEF shred sets up physical burst.

abilities.name: Walk the Plank

notes: Execute threshold inferred from context
Push 2 + execute. Position disruptive and lethal at low HP.

abilities.name: Bloodlust

notes: 15% max HP self-damage — model exact HP threshold before recommending
Self-damage must be modeled. Only safe if hero HP > 15% max after hit.

abilities.name: Blind Rage
notes: 4-8 random hits. High variance — use Monte Carlo. Do not auto-execute in uncertain states.

abilities.name: Blood Rage

notes: Damages all allies. Model exact HP before recommending.
Channels 500 init. AoE + friendly fire + Berserk. NEVER auto-execute without careful HP modeling.

abilities.name: Brutal Act

notes: Random ally takes significant friendly fire damage
Random target + random friendly fire. Pure Monte Carlo territory.

abilities.name: Future Sight
notes: Delayed heal at 10 ticks. Track as delayed packet in simulation.

abilities.name: Sanctuary
notes: Channels 500. Party barrier + delayed AoE heal. Extremely high value in sustained fights.

abilities.name: Osmotic Ward
notes: Pure Ward for 2 turns + heal-on-break. Model ward break as separate damage absorption event.

abilities.name: Time Sink
notes: Slow + delayed damage that scales off target AGI. Track as delayed packet.

abilities.name: Wall of Reflection
notes: Seer version of Wall of Reflection. AP-scaling. Reflect pulses at 20 and 30 ticks.
